caption: A man wearing a pink t-shirt and black shorts plays basketball in an indoor gymnasium. The gym features a polished wooden court with blue-painted areas, a green semi-circle under the hoop, and blue bleachers in the background. A basketball hoop with a white backboard and red rim is mounted on a white brick wall. Initially, the man is captured mid-air on the left side of the court, clutching a basketball. He then leaps high toward the hoop, extending the ball upward. After landing, he is seen jogging across the court, holding the ball in front of him. Finally, he continues to move toward the right side of the court, maintaining his grip on the basketball as he navigates the wooden floor. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
